expectations.evidence: Completed in 226.8s with 34028 tokens. Previous iteration timed out twice.

expectations.text: Only the Top 15 companies are scanned by default (not the extended list)
expectations.evidence: Transcript: 'Scan scope: Top 15 companies (default)'. Lists exactly 15 companies: Linear, Supabase, Deel, Cursor, PostHog, Snyk, ClickUp, Notion, Render, Retool, Railway, Clerk, Neon, Vanta, WorkOS

expectations.text: Results are filtered for remote positions
expectations.evidence: Transcript: filtering criteria show 'isRemote' and 'workplaceType: Remote' checks. All 14 results are remote-tagged.
Transcript explicitly notes exclusions: 'Senior Full-Stack excluded', 'Staff Backend Engineer excluded', 'Staff Software Engineer excluded', 'Senior Sales Manager -- excluded'

expectations.text: Results include company name, job title, and apply URL
expectations.evidence: Results file contains table with Company, Title, Type, Apply URL columns for all 14 matches

expectations.text: A summary total is provided (X jobs found across Y companies)
expectations.evidence: Results: '14 remote dev-relevant jobs found across 7 companies out of 15 Ashby companies scanned'
